title: CC4.Marketing Public Launch
summary: Full course website with 17 interactive lessons, dark mode, Substack subscription, donation support, SEO optimization, and retro-futuristic design system.
machine_summary: Initial public release. 3 modules (Getting Started, Core Concepts, Advanced Apps), 17 MDX lessons, dark mode, Substack email capture, PayPal/Ko-fi donations, GitHub feedback, comprehensive SEO with JSON-LD, Cloudflare + GitHub Pages deployment.

title: Live changelog with timeline, filters, and agent feeds
summary: Added a full changelog system with a beautiful timeline page, type filters, search, contextual lesson banners, a /whats-new Claude Code skill, and llms.txt for AI agent discovery.
machine_summary: Deployed BearlyChange as Cloudflare Worker with KV storage. Created /changelog page with timeline view, version grouping, filter pills, search. Added WhatsNew homepage section, ModuleUpdatesBanner on lesson pages, /whats-new skill, llms.txt and llms-full.txt, RSS/JSON feeds, auto-changelog CI workflow.

title: Fix content consistency across site
summary: Fixed lesson counts in JSON-LD and homepage to correctly show 17, updated Module 0 card to 4 lessons, normalized Ko-fi links, and resolved SEO title duplication.
machine_summary: Corrected lesson count from 16/18 to 17 in JSON-LD structured data and homepage. Fixed Module 0 lesson count from 3 to 4. Normalized Ko-fi URLs. Fixed BaseLayout title template duplication.

title: Update install steps to match Substack flow
summary: Updated the quickstart installation steps on the homepage to match the current Substack-based subscription and course download process.
machine_summary: Updated 4-step quickstart instructions on index.astro to reflect Substack subscribe flow instead of previous direct download approach.

title: Centralized site config, brand guide, and PR guide
summary: Moved all site configuration to a single siteData.ts, added brand guidelines page, GitHub PR contribution guide, and cleaned up unused components.
machine_summary: Created siteData.ts centralizing nav, modules, features, stats. Added brand-guide.astro page. Added GitHub PR guide lesson (0.3). Removed email subscription API and unused navigation components. Updated module content ordering.

title: Enhanced changelog API with agent metadata
summary: The /api/changelog endpoint now returns richer metadata including site URL, feed URLs, and llms.txt pointer for better AI agent consumption.
machine_summary: Updated handleApiChangelog to return description, site_url, feed_urls (json, rss), and llms_txt fields. Added JSON response (201) support for POST /admin/entries when Accept: application/json header is present.
